name: TARGETPAIRS_ASSIGNEE_DIVERSITY_GROWTH_AFTER_YEAR
description: Target pairs with high assignee diversity after a given year.
cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WHERE y.year > $year MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair) MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee) RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT a) AS assignee_count_after_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count_after_year ORDER BY assignee_count_after_year DESC, patent_count_after_year DESC, target_pair LIMIT 20;
